column3:
GREETINGS COMRADES!

⪼ Gather quest items -> then go through the Best West Quest turn in portal.
⪼ Submit your quest in the #best-west-turn-in channel and copy the command for your quest, inc chest number if applicable. Max 5 quests can be submitted at the same time
⪼ Collect your reward once a Best West Rep processes it in the same drop box you left your items in. Quests are only done once.
⪼ Rewards must be collected within 1 week. Please put mats for multiple quests in the same box.
Requirements
